name: python3-libvslvm
title: python3-libvslvm
summary: Linux LVM volume system format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Linux LVM volume system format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvslvm is a library to access the Linux Logical Volume Manager
(LVM) volume system format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvslvm.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libvslvm because Linux LVM volume system format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libvslvm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libvslvm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libvslvm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
